### Synthesis

```{r}

total <- data.frame()
df_analysis <- data.frame()

for (exp in exposures) {
  for (lag_i in lags) {

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 1. Construct the object name: cv.<exposure>.total.lag0_<lag>
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      obj_name <- paste0("cv.", exp, ".total.lag0_", lag_i)

      # Check object exists
      if (!exists(obj_name)) {
        message("Skipping missing object: ", obj_name)
        next
      }

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 2. Run meta analysis
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      dat <- get(obj_name)
      
      title_txt <- paste0(
        "Cardiovascular, Total - ", exp, " - ",
        " (lag 0-", lag_i, " h)"
      )

      obj <- meta_analyze(dat, title_txt)

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 3. Build summary row
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      tmp <- data.frame(
        exposure = exp,
        lag      = paste0("0-", lag_i),
        k        = obj$k,
        I2       = paste0(round(obj$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
        ee       = round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        lb       = round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        ub       = round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        pval     = format(obj$pval.random, scientific = FALSE),
        significant = ifelse(round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2)>0,"*","")
      )
      
      tbl <- data.frame(title = obj$title,
                        studlab = obj$studlab, 
                        ee = paste0(round((exp(obj$TE) - 1) * 100, 2), "%"), 
                        lb = paste0(round((exp(obj$lower) - 1) * 100, 2), "%"), 
                        ub = paste0(round((exp(obj$upper) - 1) * 100, 2), "%"),
                        weight = paste0(round(obj$w.random/sum(obj$w.random) * 100, 2), "%"))

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 4. Append to master dataset
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      total <- rbind(total, tmp)
      df_analysis <- rbind(df_analysis, tbl)
  }
}

total_cv <- total %>% 
  mutate(exposure_lag = paste0(exposure," (", lag, " h)"),
         I2 = sub(".","·",I2,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = paste0(ee,"% (",lb,"% to ",ub,"%)"),
         risk = gsub(".","·",risk,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = gsub("-","−",risk,fixed=TRUE),
         lag = paste0("   Lag ", sub("-","−",lag,fixed=TRUE), " hours")) %>%
  add_row(.before=1) %>%
  add_row(.before=7) %>%
  add_row(.before=12) %>%
  add_row(.before=18) %>%
  add_row(.before=21) %>%
  add_row(.before=27) %>%
  add_row(.before=33) %>%
  add_row(.before=39) %>%
  add_row(.before=45) %>%
  add_row(.before=51) %>%
  add_row(.before=56)
  
total_cv$lag[c(1,7,12,18,21,27,33,39,45,51,56)] <- exposures

write.csv(total, "Cardiovascular Estimates (Total).csv")
write.csv(df_analysis, "Dataset - Cardiovascular (Total).csv")

#DL estimator

total_DL <- data.frame()
df_analysis_DL <- data.frame()

for (exp in exposures) {
  for (lag_i in lags) {

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 1. Construct the object name: cv.<exposure>.total.lag0_<lag>
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      obj_name <- paste0("cv.", exp, ".total.lag0_", lag_i)

      # Check object exists
      if (!exists(obj_name)) {
        message("Skipping missing object: ", obj_name)
        next
      }

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 2. Run meta analysis
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      dat <- get(obj_name)
      
      title_txt <- paste0(
        "Cardiovascular, Total - ", exp, " - ",
        " (lag 0-", lag_i, " h)"
      )

      obj <- meta_analyze_DL(dat, title_txt)

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 3. Build summary row
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      tmp <- data.frame(
        exposure = exp,
        lag      = paste0("0-", lag_i),
        k        = obj$k,
        I2       = paste0(round(obj$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
        ee       = paste0(round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "%"),
        lb       = paste0(round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "%"),
        ub       = paste0(round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "%"),
        pval     = format(obj$pval.random, scientific = FALSE),
        significant = ifelse(round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2)>0,"*","")
      )
      
      tbl <- data.frame(title = obj$title,
                        studlab = obj$studlab, 
                        ee = paste0(round((exp(obj$TE) - 1) * 100, 2), "%"), 
                        lb = paste0(round((exp(obj$lower) - 1) * 100, 2), "%"), 
                        ub = paste0(round((exp(obj$upper) - 1) * 100, 2), "%"),
                        weight = paste0(round(obj$w.random/sum(obj$w.random) * 100, 2), "%"))

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 4. Append to master dataset
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      total_DL <- rbind(total_DL, tmp)
      df_analysis_DL <- rbind(df_analysis_DL, tbl)
  }
}

```

By Continent

```{r}

continents  <- c("Asia", "America", "Australia", "Europe")

total_continent <- data.frame()

for (exp in exposures) {
  for (lag_i in lags) {
    for (ct in continents) {

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 1. Construct the object name: cv.<exposure>.total.lag0_<lag>
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      obj_name <- paste0("cv.", exp, ".total.lag0_", lag_i)

      # Check object exists
      if (!exists(obj_name)) {
        message("Skipping missing object: ", obj_name)
        next
      }

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 2. Retrieve dataset and subset by continent
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      dat <- get(obj_name)
      dat_sub <- dat[dat$continent == ct, ]

      if (nrow(dat_sub) == 0) {
        message("No rows for ", obj_name, " + ", ct)
        next
      }

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 3. Run meta analysis
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      title_txt <- paste0(
        "Cardiovascular, Total - ", exp, " - ", ct,
        " (lag 0-", lag_i, " h)"
      )

      obj <- meta_analyze(dat_sub, title_txt)

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 4. Build summary row
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      tmp <- data.frame(
        exposure = exp,
        continent  = ct,
        lag      = paste0("0-", lag_i),
        k        = obj$k,
        I2       = paste0(round(obj$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
        ee       = round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        lb       = round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        ub       = round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        pval     = format(obj$pval.random, scientific = FALSE),
        significant = ifelse(round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2)>0,"*",""),
        logRR    = obj$TE.random,
        logSE    = obj$seTE.random
      )

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 5. Append to master dataset
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      total_continent <- rbind(total_continent, tmp)
    }
  }
}

total_continent <- total_continent[total_continent$k>=3,]
total_continent <- total_continent %>%
  arrange(factor(exposure, levels = exposures), factor(lag, levels = c("0-1", "0-3", "0-8", "0-12", "0-24")), continent) %>%
  group_by(exposure, lag) %>%
  mutate(
    w = 1 / logSE^2,
    beta_bar = sum(w * logRR) / sum(w),
    Q = sum(w * (logRR - beta_bar)^2),
    df_Q = n() - 1,
    p_diff = pchisq(Q, df_Q, lower.tail = FALSE),
    p_diff = if_else(row_number() == 1, p_diff, NA_real_),
    p_diff = na_if(p_diff, 1),
    sig_diff = if_else(p_diff < 0.05, "*", "")
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-c(logRR, logSE, w, beta_bar, Q, df_Q))

write.csv(total_continent, "Cardiovascular Total Estimates by Continent.csv")

total_continent$lag[duplicated(total_continent[, c("exposure", "lag")])] <- NA

total_continent_PM <- total_continent %>% 
  filter(exposure %in% pm) %>%
  mutate(exposure_lag = paste0(exposure," (", lag, " h)"),
         I2 = sub(".","·",I2,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = paste0(ee,"% (",lb,"% to ",ub,"%)"),
         risk = gsub(".","·",risk,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = gsub("-","−",risk,fixed=TRUE),
         continent = paste0("   ", continent))

total_continent_PM <- total_continent_PM %>%
  add_row(.before=36) %>%
  add_row(.before=35) %>%
  add_row(.before=35) %>%
  add_row(.before=31) %>%
  add_row(.before=27) %>%
  add_row(.before=23) %>%
  add_row(.before=20) %>%
  add_row(.before=16) %>%
  add_row(.before=16) %>%
  add_row(.before=15) %>%
  add_row(.before=14) %>%
  add_row(.before=14) %>%
  add_row(.before=11) %>%
  add_row(.before=8)  %>%
  add_row(.before=5)  %>%
  add_row(.before=3) %>%
  add_row(.before=1) %>%
  add_row(.before=1)
  
total_continent_PM$continent[c(1,20,25,50)] <- pm
total_continent_PM$continent[c(16,23,45,53)] <- "Lag 0−24 hours"
total_continent_PM$continent[c(12,21,40)] <- "Lag 0−12 hours"
total_continent_PM$continent[c(8,35)] <- "Lag 0−8 hours"
total_continent_PM$continent[c(5,31,51)] <- "Lag 0−3 hours"
total_continent_PM$continent[c(2,26)] <- "Lag 0−1 hours"


total_continent_gas <- total_continent %>% 
  filter(exposure %in% gas) %>%
  mutate(exposure_lag = paste0(exposure," (", lag, " h)"),
         I2 = sub(".","·",I2,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = paste0(ee,"% (",lb,"% to ",ub,"%)"),
         risk = gsub(".","·",risk,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = gsub("-","−",risk,fixed=TRUE),
         continent = paste0("   ", continent))

  add_row(.before=2) %>%
  add_row(.before=1) %>%
  add_row(.before=1)
  
total_continent_gas$continent[c(1,15,34,52)] <- gas
total_continent_gas$continent[c(11,30,48,62)] <- "Lag 0−24 hours"

total_continent_gas$continent[c(2,16,35,53)] <- "Lag 0−1 hours"
```

By POC

```{r}

outcomes  <- c("EAC", "EHA")

total_outcome <- data.frame()

for (exp in exposures) {
  for (lag_i in lags) {
    for (ct in outcomes) {

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 1. Construct the object name: cv.<exposure>.total.lag0_<lag>
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      obj_name <- paste0("cv.", exp, ".total.lag0_", lag_i)

      # Check object exists
      if (!exists(obj_name)) {
        message("Skipping missing object: ", obj_name)
        next
      }

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 2. Retrieve dataset and subset by outcome
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      dat <- get(obj_name)
      dat_sub <- dat[dat$Outcome == ct, ]

      if (nrow(dat_sub) == 0) {
        message("No rows for ", obj_name, " + ", ct)
        next
      }

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 3. Run meta analysis
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      title_txt <- paste0(
        "Cardiovascular, Total - ", exp, " - ", ct,
        " (lag 0-", lag_i, " h)"
      )

      obj <- meta_analyze(dat_sub, title_txt)

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 4. Build summary row
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      tmp <- data.frame(
        exposure = exp,
        Outcome  = ct,
        lag      = paste0("0-", lag_i),
        k        = obj$k,
        I2       = paste0(round(obj$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
        ee       = round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        lb       = round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        ub       = round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        pval     = format(obj$pval.random, scientific = FALSE),
        significant = ifelse(round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2)>0,"*",""),
        logRR    = obj$TE.random,
        logSE    = obj$seTE.random
      )

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 5. Append to master dataset
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      total_outcome <- rbind(total_outcome, tmp)
    }
  }
}

total_outcome <- total_outcome[total_outcome$k>=3,]
total_outcome <- total_outcome %>%
  arrange(factor(exposure, levels = exposures), factor(lag, levels = c("0-1", "0-3", "0-8", "0-12", "0-24")), Outcome) %>%
  group_by(exposure, lag) %>%
  mutate(
    p_diff = 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs((logRR - lead(logRR)) / sqrt(logSE^2 + lead(logSE)^2)))),
    sig_diff = ifelse(p_diff<0.05,"*","")
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-c(logRR, logSE))

write.csv(total_outcome, "Cardiovascular Total Estimates by outcome.csv")

total_outcome$lag[duplicated(total_outcome[, c("exposure", "lag")])] <- NA

total_outcome_PM <- total_outcome %>% 
  filter(exposure %in% pm) %>%
  mutate(exposure_lag = paste0(exposure," (", lag, " h)"),
         I2 = sub(".","·",I2,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = paste0(ee,"% (",lb,"% to ",ub,"%)"),
         risk = gsub(".","·",risk,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = gsub("-","−",risk,fixed=TRUE),
         Outcome = paste0("   ", Outcome))

total_outcome_PM <- total_outcome_PM %>%
  add_row(.before=27) %>%
  add_row(.before=26) %>%
  add_row(.before=25) %>%
  add_row(.before=25) %>%
  add_row(.before=24) %>%
  add_row(.before=23) %>%
  add_row(.before=23) %>%
  add_row(.before=21) %>%
  add_row(.before=19) %>%
  add_row(.before=17) %>%
  add_row(.before=15) %>%
  add_row(.before=13) %>%
  add_row(.before=13) %>%
  add_row(.before=12)  %>%
  add_row(.before=11)  %>%
  add_row(.before=11) %>%
  add_row(.before=9)  %>%
  add_row(.before=7)  %>%
  add_row(.before=5) %>%
  add_row(.before=3) %>%
  add_row(.before=1) %>%
  add_row(.before=1)
  
total_outcome_PM$Outcome[c(1,17,22,38,43)] <- pm
total_outcome_PM$Outcome[c(14,20,35,41,48)] <- "Lag 0−24 hours"
total_outcome_PM$Outcome[c(11,18,32,46)] <- "Lag 0−12 hours"
total_outcome_PM$Outcome[c(8,29)] <- "Lag 0−8 hours"
total_outcome_PM$Outcome[c(5,26,39)] <- "Lag 0−3 hours"
total_outcome_PM$Outcome[c(2,23,44)] <- "Lag 0−1 hours"


total_outcome_gas <- total_outcome %>% 
  filter(exposure %in% gas) %>%
  mutate(exposure_lag = paste0(exposure," (", lag, " h)"),
         I2 = sub(".","·",I2,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = paste0(ee,"% (",lb,"% to ",ub,"%)"),
         risk = gsub(".","·",risk,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = gsub("-","−",risk,fixed=TRUE),
```

By WHO

```{r}

exposures_WHO <- c("PM10", "PM2.5", "NO2", "O3")

WHO_high <- data.frame()

for (i in c(1,3,8,12,24)) {
  for (j in seq_along(exposures_WHO)) {

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 1. Construct the object name: cv.<exposure>.total.lag0_<lag>
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      obj <- get(paste0("ma.cv.", exposures_WHO[j], ".total.lag0_", i, ".high"))

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 2. Run meta analysis
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      tmp <- data.frame(
        exposure = exposures_WHO[j],
        who = "Above",
        lag      = paste0("0-", i),
        k        = obj$k,
        I2       = paste0(round(obj$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
        ee       = round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        lb       = round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        ub       = round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        pval     = format(obj$pval.random, scientific = FALSE),
        significant = ifelse(round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2)>0,"*",""),
        logRR    = obj$TE.random,
        logSE    = obj$seTE.random
      )

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 3. Append to master dataset
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      WHO_high <- rbind(WHO_high, tmp)
  }
}

WHO_low <- data.frame()

for (i in c(1,3,8,12,24)) {
  for (j in seq_along(exposures_WHO)) {

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 1. Construct the object name: cv.<exposure>.total.lag0_<lag>
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      obj <- get(paste0("ma.cv.", exposures_WHO[j], ".total.lag0_", i, ".low"))

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 2. Run meta analysis
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      tmp <- data.frame(
        exposure = exposures_WHO[j],
        who = "Below",
        lag      = paste0("0-", i),
        k        = obj$k,
        I2       = paste0(round(obj$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
        ee       = round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        lb       = round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        ub       = round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        pval     = format(obj$pval.random, scientific = FALSE),
        significant = ifelse(round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2)>0,"*",""),
        logRR    = obj$TE.random,
        logSE    = obj$seTE.random
      )

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 3. Append to master dataset
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      WHO_low <- rbind(WHO_low, tmp)
  }
}

total_who <- rbind(WHO_low, WHO_high)

total_who <- total_who[total_who$k>=3,]

  arrange(exposure, factor(lag, levels = c("0-1", "0-3", "0-8", "0-12", "0-24")), who) %>%
  group_by(exposure, lag) %>%
  mutate(
    p_diff = 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs((logRR - lead(logRR)) / sqrt(logSE^2 + lead(logSE)^2)))),
    sig_diff = ifelse(p_diff<0.05,"*","")
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-c(logRR, logSE))
```

By Sex

```{r}
# by sex

sex_cv <- data.frame()

for (exp in exposures) {
  for (lag_i in lags) {
    for (i in c("female", "male")) {

      obj_name <- paste0("cv_", i, ".", exp, ".lag0_", lag_i)

      if (!exists(obj_name)) {
        message("Skipping missing object: ", obj_name)
        next
      }

      dat <- get(obj_name)
      dat_sub <- dat[dat$stratification == i, ]

      if (nrow(dat_sub) == 0) {
        message("No rows for ", obj_name, " + ", i)
        next
      }

      title_txt <- paste0(
        "Cardiovascular, Total - ", exp, " - ", i,
        " Sex (lag 0-", lag_i, " h)"
      )

      obj <- meta_analyze(dat_sub, title_txt)

      tmp <- data.frame(
        exposure = exp,
        sex      = i,
        lag      = paste0("0-", lag_i),
        k        = obj$k,
        n        = sum(dat_sub$n),
        I2       = paste0(round(obj$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
        ee       = round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        lb       = round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        ub       = round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        pval     = format(obj$pval.random, scientific = FALSE),
        logRR    = obj$TE.random,
        logSE    = obj$seTE.random
      )

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 5. Append to master dataset
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      sex_cv <- rbind(sex_cv, tmp)
    }
  }
}

sex_cv <- sex_cv[sex_cv$k>=3,]
sex_cv <- sex_cv %>%
  arrange(exposure, sex)

sex_cv <- sex_cv %>%
  arrange(factor(exposure, levels=exposures), factor(lag, levels = c("0-2", "0-3", "0-8", "0-12", "0-24")), sex) %>%
  group_by(exposure, lag) %>%
  mutate(
    p_diff = 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs((logRR - lead(logRR)) / sqrt(logSE^2 + lead(logSE)^2)))),
    sig_diff = ifelse(p_diff<0.05,"*","")
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-c(logRR, logSE))

sex_cv$significant <- ifelse(sex_cv$pval<0.05,"*"," ")

write.csv(sex_cv, "Cardiovascular Total Estimates by Sex.csv")

sex_cv$lag[duplicated(sex_cv[, c("exposure", "lag")])] <- NA

sex_cv <- sex_cv %>% 
  mutate(exposure_lag = paste0(exposure," (", lag, " h)"),
         I2 = sub(".","·",I2,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = paste0(ee,"% (",lb,"% to ",ub,"%)"),
         risk = gsub(".","·",risk,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = gsub("-","−",risk,fixed=TRUE),
         sex = paste0("    ", sex))

sex_cv <- sex_cv %>%
  add_row(.before=23) %>%
  add_row(.before=23) %>%
  add_row(.before=21) %>%
  add_row(.before=19) %>%
  add_row(.before=19) %>%
  add_row(.before=17) %>%
  add_row(.before=17)  %>%
  add_row(.before=15)  %>%
  add_row(.before=15)  %>%
  add_row(.before=13)  %>%
  add_row(.before=11) %>%
  add_row(.before=9)  %>%
  add_row(.before=7)  %>%
  add_row(.before=7)  %>%
  add_row(.before=5) %>%
  add_row(.before=3) %>%
  add_row(.before=1) %>%
  add_row(.before=1)
  
sex_cv$sex[c(1,11,24,28,32,39)] <- c("PM10", "PM2.5", "CO", "NO2", "O3", "SO2")
sex_cv$sex[c(8,21,25,29,36,40)] <- "Lag 0−24 hours"
```

```{r}

age_cv <- data.frame()

for (exp in exposures) {
  for (lag_i in lags) {
    for (i in c("adult", "elderly")) {

      obj_name <- paste0("cv_", i, ".", exp, ".lag0_", lag_i)

      if (!exists(obj_name)) {
        message("Skipping missing object: ", obj_name)
        next
      }

      dat <- get(obj_name)
      dat_sub <- dat[dat$stratification == i, ]

      if (nrow(dat_sub) == 0) {
        message("No rows for ", obj_name, " + ", i)
        next
      }

      title_txt <- paste0(
        "Cardiovascular, Total - ", exp, " - ", i,
        " age (lag 0-", lag_i, " h)"
      )

      obj <- meta_analyze(dat_sub, title_txt)

      tmp <- data.frame(
        exposure = exp,
        age      = i,
        lag      = paste0("0-", lag_i),
        k        = obj$k,
        n        = sum(dat_sub$n),
        I2       = paste0(round(obj$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
        ee       = round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        lb       = round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        ub       = round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        pval     = format(obj$pval.random, scientific = FALSE),
        logRR    = obj$TE.random,
        logSE    = obj$seTE.random
      )

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 5. Append to master dataset
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      age_cv <- rbind(age_cv, tmp)
    }
  }
}

age_cv <- age_cv[age_cv$k>=3,]

    sig_diff = ifelse(p_diff<0.05,"*","")
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-c(logRR, logSE))
```

```{r}
season_cv <- data.frame()

for (exp in exposures) {
  for (lag_i in lags) {
    for (i in c("cold", "warm")) {

      obj_name <- paste0("cv_", i, ".", exp, ".lag0_", lag_i)

      if (!exists(obj_name)) {
        message("Skipping missing object: ", obj_name)
        next
      }

      dat <- get(obj_name)
      dat_sub <- dat[dat$stratification == i, ]

      if (nrow(dat_sub) == 0) {
        message("No rows for ", obj_name, " + ", i)
        next
      }

      title_txt <- paste0(
        "Cardiovascular, Total - ", exp, " - ", i,
        " season (lag 0-", lag_i, " h)"
      )

      obj <- meta_analyze(dat_sub, title_txt)

      tmp <- data.frame(
        exposure = exp,
        season      = i,
        lag      = paste0("0-", lag_i),
        k        = obj$k,
        n        = sum(dat_sub$n),
        I2       = paste0(round(obj$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
        ee       = round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        lb       = round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        ub       = round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2),

        logRR    = obj$TE.random,
        logSE    = obj$seTE.random
      )

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 5. Append to master dataset
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      season_cv <- rbind(season_cv, tmp)
    }
  }
}

  add_row(.before=1) %>%
  add_row(.before=1)
  
season_cv$season[c(1,11,24,28,35, 48)] <- c("PM10", "PM2.5", "CO", "NO2", "O3", "SO2")
season_cv$season[c(8,21,25,32,45,49)] <- "Lag 0−24 hours"
season_cv$season[c(18,42)] <- "Lag 0−12 hours"
season_cv$season[c(5,15,29,39)] <- "Lag 0−8 hours"
season_cv$season[36] <- "Lag 0−3 hours"
season_cv$season[c(2,12)] <- "Lag 0−2 hours"

```

### Forest Plots

Overall

```{r}

total_cv_airpol <- total_cv %>% filter(!exposure %in% c("heat", "cold") & !lag %in% c("heat", "cold") )

lag_labels_total <- lapply(total_cv_airpol$lag, function(x) {
  if (is.na(x)) return(NA)
  
  switch(x,
    # ── Pollutant subheaders (subscript) ────────────────────────────────
    "PM2.5"    = expression("PM"["2·5"]),
    "PM10"     = expression("PM"[10]),
    "PM10_2.5" = expression("PM"["10−2·5"]),
    "NO2"      = expression("NO"[2]),
    "SO2"      = expression("SO"[2]),
    "O3"       = expression("O"[3]),
    "heat"     = "Heat",
    "cold"     = "Cold",
    
    # ── Everything else (lag period rows, CO) stays plain ───────────────
    x
  )
})

total_forest_airpol <-
forestplot(
  labeltext = list(
    lag = lag_labels_total,
    k   = total_cv_airpol$k,
    I2  = total_cv_airpol$I2,
    ER  = total_cv_airpol$risk,
    nil = rep(NA, nrow(total_cv_airpol))  # ← was NA, must match row count
  ),
  mean  = total_cv_airpol$ee,
  lower = total_cv_airpol$lb,
  upper = total_cv_airpol$ub,
  graph.pos          = 5,
  boxsize            = 0.2,
  ci.vertices        = TRUE,
  ci.vertices.height = 0.1,
  lineheight         = unit(7, "mm"),
  clip               = c(-1.5, 3),
  arrow              = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
  col = fpColors(
    box  = "black",
    line = "black",
    zero = "black"
  ),
  txt_gp = fpTxtGp(
    label = gpar(fontface = "plain", cex = 0.9),
    ticks = gpar(fontface = "plain", cex = 0.6),
    xlab  = gpar(fontface = "bold",  cex = 0.8),
    title = gpar(fontface = "bold",  cex = 0.9)
  ),
  lty   = 1,
  align = "l"
) |>
  fp_add_header(
    lag = "Exposure",
    k   = "No. of studies",
    nil = "",
    ER  = "Excess Risk (95% CI)",
    I2  = expression(bold(italic(I)^2))
  ) |>
  fp_add_lines(
    h_2  = gpar(col = "black", lty = 1),
    h_52 = gpar(col = "black", lty = 1)
  )

total_cv_temp <- total_cv %>% filter(exposure %in% c("heat", "cold") | lag %in% c("heat", "cold") )

lag_labels_total <- lapply(total_cv_temp$lag, function(x) {
  if (is.na(x)) return(NA)
  
  switch(x,

    "heat"     = "Heat",
    "cold"     = "Cold",
    
    # ── Everything else (lag period rows, CO) stays plain ───────────────
    x
  )
})

total_forest_temp <-
forestplot(
  labeltext = list(
    lag = lag_labels_total,
    k   = total_cv_temp$k,
    I2  = total_cv_temp$I2,
```

### Funnel Plots
```{r}

pollutants_bias <- c("PM10", "PM2.5", "NO2", "O3", "SO2", "CO")

total_bias <- data.frame()

for (exp in pollutants_bias) {
  for (lag_i in lags) {
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 1. Construct the object name: ma.cv.<pollutant>.total.lag0_<lag>
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    obj_name <- paste0("ma.cv.", exp, ".total.lag0_", lag_i)
    
    # Check object exists
    if (!exists(obj_name)) {
      message("Skipping missing object: ", obj_name)
      next
    }
    
    dat <- get(obj_name)
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 2. Run Egger's test safely
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    egger_res <- tryCatch(
      metabias(dat, method.bias = "Egger", k.min = 10),
      error = function(e) return(NULL)
    )
    
    # If test failed, skip / return NA
    intercept_val <- if (!is.null(egger_res) && length(egger_res$estimate) > 0) egger_res$estimate[1] else NA
    pval_val      <- if (!is.null(egger_res) && !is.null(egger_res$pval)) egger_res$pval else NA
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 3. Build summary row
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    tmp <- data.frame(
      exposure  = exp,
      lag       = paste0("Lag 0-", lag_i, " h"),
      intercept = signif(intercept_val,2),
      p_value   = ifelse(pval_val<0.001, "<.001", round(pval_val,3))
    )
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 4. Append to master dataset
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    total_bias <- rbind(total_bias, tmp)
  }
}

total_bias <- total_bias[!is.na(total_bias$intercept),]


```
### Sensitivity Analyses

```{r}
# exploratory meta-regressions

names <- c(
  "cv.PM2.5.total.lag0_3",
  "cv.PM2.5.total.lag0_8",
  "cv.PM2.5.total.lag0_12",
  "cv.PM2.5.total.lag0_24",
  "cv.NO2.total.lag0_24"
)

for (i in names) {
  aa <- get(i)
  aa$continent <- relevel(as.factor(aa$continent), ref = "Asia")
  assign(i, aa)
}

vars <- c("mean_adjusted", "continent", "Outcome", "male_pct")

metareg(meta_analyze(get(names[5]), "X"), as.formula(paste0("~", vars[4])))

# analyses

sen_main <- data.frame()
sen_adj <- data.frame()
sen_loo  <- data.frame()

  
for (exp in exposures) {
  for (lag_i in lags) {

      # -------------------------------------------------------
      # 1. Retrieve dataset
      # -------------------------------------------------------
      obj_name <- paste0(
        "cv.", exp, ".total.lag0_", lag_i
      )

      if (!exists(obj_name, inherits = TRUE)) next

      dat <- get(obj_name, inherits = TRUE)

      if (nrow(dat) < 3) next

      # -------------------------------------------------------
      # 2. Main meta-analysis
      # -------------------------------------------------------
      obj <- meta_analyze(
        dat,
        paste0("Cardiovascular, Total - ", exp, " (lag 0-", lag_i, " h)")
      )

      # -------------------------------------------------------
      # 3. Leave-one-out meta-analysis
      # -------------------------------------------------------
      loo_ma <- metainf(obj, pooled="random")

      loo_tbl <- data.frame(
        exposure = exp,
        lag      = paste0("0-", lag_i),
        ee       = paste0(round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "% (",
                          round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2), ", ",
                          round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "%)"),
        studlab = loo_ma$studlab,
        ee_loo  = paste0(round((exp(loo_ma$TE) - 1) * 100, 2), "% (",
                          round((exp(loo_ma$lower) - 1) * 100, 2), ", ",
                          round((exp(loo_ma$upper) - 1) * 100, 2), "%)"),
  p_diff   = 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs((obj$TE.random-loo_ma$TE)/(sqrt(obj$seTE.random^2 + loo_ma$seTE^2))))),
  diff_sig = ifelse(2 * (1 - pnorm(abs((obj$TE.random-loo_ma$TE)/(sqrt(obj$seTE.random^2 + loo_ma$seTE^2))))) < 0.05, "Yes", "No")
      ) %>%
        filter(
          sign(loo_ma$TE) != sign(obj$TE.random) & sign(loo_ma$lower) != sign(obj$lower.random)
        )

      sen_loo <- rbind(sen_loo, loo_tbl)

      # -------------------------------------------------------
      # 4. High RoB exclusion
      # -------------------------------------------------------
      rob_dat <- dat %>% filter(RoB != "High")

      if (nrow(rob_dat) < 3) next

      rob <- meta_analyze(
        rob_dat,
        paste0(
          "Cardiovascular, Total - ", exp,
          " (lag 0-", lag_i, " h) - Excluding High RoB"
        )
      )

      # -------------------------------------------------------
      # 5. Main sensitivity summary row
      # -------------------------------------------------------
      tmp <- data.frame(
        exposure   = exp,
        lag        = paste0("0-", lag_i),
        k          = obj$k,
        I2       = paste0(round(obj$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
        ee       = paste0(round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "% (",
                          round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2), ", ",
                          round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "%)"),
        PI       = paste0("(", round((exp(obj$lower.predict) - 1) * 100, 2), ", ",
                            round((exp(obj$upper.predict) - 1) * 100, 2), "%)"),
        k_removed  = rob$k,
        I2_removed = paste0(round(rob$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
        ee_removed =  paste0(round((exp(rob$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "% (",
                          round((exp(rob$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2), ", ",
                          round((exp(rob$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "%)"),
  p_diff   = if (!is.null(rob)) 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs((obj$TE.random-rob$TE.random)/(sqrt(obj$seTE.random^2 + rob$seTE.random^2))))) else NA_integer_,
  diff_sig = if (!is.null(rob)) ifelse(2 * (1 - pnorm(abs((obj$TE.random-rob$TE.random)/(sqrt(obj$seTE.random^2 + rob$seTE.random^2))))) < 0.05, "Yes", "No") else NA_integer_,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )

      sen_main <- rbind(sen_main, tmp)
      
      # -------------------------------------------------------
      # 6. Trim-and-fill meta-analysis for k>=10 and Egger's p<0.05
      # -------------------------------------------------------
      
      if (is.null(obj$k) || obj$k < 10) {
      message("Skip ", exp, " lag 0-", lag_i, " (k = ", obj$k, ")")
      next
      }
      
      bias <- funBias(obj)
      egger_pval <- as.numeric(bias$pval[1])
      
      adj <- if (!is.na(egger_pval) && egger_pval < 0.05) {
      trimfill(obj)
    } else {
      NULL
    }
      
      adjdf <- data.frame(
  exposure = exp,
  lag      = paste0("0-", lag_i),
  k        = obj$k,
  I2       = paste0(round(obj$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
  ee       = paste0(round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "% (",
                    round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2), ", ",
                    round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "%)"),
  egger_p  = format(egger_pval, scientific = FALSE),
  adj_yn   = ifelse(egger_pval < 0.05,"Yes",NA),
  k_added  = if (!is.null(adj)) adj$k0 else NA_integer_,
  I2_adj =  paste0(round(adj$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
  ee_adj = if (!is.null(adj))
    paste0(round((exp(adj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "% (",
           round((exp(adj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2), ", ",
           round((exp(adj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "%)")
  else "",
  p_diff   = if (!is.null(adj)) 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs((obj$TE.random-adj$TE.random)/(sqrt(obj$seTE.random^2 + adj$seTE.random^2))))) else NA_integer_,
  diff_sig = if (!is.null(adj)) ifelse(2 * (1 - pnorm(abs((obj$TE.random-adj$TE.random)/(sqrt(obj$seTE.random^2 + adj$seTE.random^2))))) < 0.05, "Yes", "No") else NA_integer_
    )

    sen_adj <- rbind(sen_adj, adjdf)
      
    }
  }

metainf(ma.cv.PM2.5.total.lag0_1, pooled="random")

?metainf
sen_main$lag[duplicated(sen_main[, c("exposure", "lag")])] <- NA
sen_main$exposure[duplicated(sen_main$exposure)] <- NA

write.csv(sen_main, "Sensitivity Analysis - Cardiovascular Estimates (Total).csv")

sen_loo$lag[duplicated(sen_loo[, c("exposure", "lag")])] <- NA
sen_loo$exposure[duplicated(sen_loo$exposure)] <- NA

write.csv(sen_loo, "LOO Analysis - Cardiovascular Estimates (Total).csv")

sen_adj$lag[duplicated(sen_adj[, c("exposure", "lag")])] <- NA
sen_adj$exposure[duplicated(sen_adj$exposure)] <- NA

write.csv(sen_adj, "Cardiovascular Estimates (Total) - Adjusted.csv")
```
# Respiratory

## All-cause analyses

Prepare working data set

```{r}
res.fixedeffects <- res %>%
  filter(general %in% c("fixed-effects", "y (combined)")) 

res.fixedeffects <- res.fixedeffects %>%
  arrange(exposure, lag, desc(disease))

for (i in seq(1, 136, by = 9)) {
  ma.res.fixedeffects <- meta_analyze_overall(res.fixedeffects[(i+1):(i+8), ])
  
  res.fixedeffects[i, c("alog.EE", "alog.SE")] <- c(ma.res.fixedeffects$TE.fixed, ma.res.fixedeffects$seTE.fixed)
}

res.all <- res %>%
  filter(general == "y") %>%
  bind_rows(
    res.fixedeffects %>% filter(general == "y (combined)")
  )

res.all <- res.all %>%
  arrange(fa_year, disease, exposure)

res.PM10.total <- res.all %>%
    filter(exposure == "PM10")

res.PM2.5.total <- res.all %>%
  filter(exposure == "PM2.5")

res.NO2.total <- res.all %>%
  filter(exposure == "NO2")

res.O3.total <- res.all %>%
  filter(exposure == "O3")

res.SO2.total <- res.all %>%
  filter(exposure == "SO2")

```

### PM10

```{r, lag 0-8 h}

res.PM10.total.lag0_6 <- res.PM10.total %>%
  filter(lag %in% c(0:6, "0-6", "1-6", "2-6"))

res.PM10.total.lag0_6[2, c("lag", "ee_original", "ll_original", "ul_original", "se_original",
                          "log.EE", "log.SE", "alog.EE", "alog.SE")] <- 
  c("1-6", rep(NA, 6), meta_analyze_lag(res.PM10.total.lag0_6[2:3,])$TE.fixed, meta_analyze_lag(res.PM10.total.lag0_6[2:3,])$seTE.fixed)

res.PM10.total.lag0_6 <- res.PM10.total.lag0_6 %>%
    mutate(across(c(alog.EE, alog.SE), as.numeric))

res.PM10.total.lag0_6[5, c("lag", "ee_original", "ll_original", "ul_original", "se_original",
                          "log.EE", "log.SE", "alog.EE", "alog.SE")] <- 
  c("0-6", rep(NA, 6), meta_analyze_lag(res.PM10.total.lag0_6[5:7,])$TE.fixed, meta_analyze_lag(res.PM10.total.lag0_6[7:9,])$seTE.fixed)

res.PM10.total.lag0_6 <- res.PM10.total.lag0_6 %>%
    mutate(across(c(alog.EE, alog.SE), as.numeric))

res.PM10.total.lag0_6 <- res.PM10.total.lag0_6[-c(3, 6:7),]

ma.res.PM10.total.lag0_6 <- meta_analyze(res.PM10.total.lag0_6, "Respiratory, Total - PM10 (lag 0-6 h)")
summary(ma.res.PM10.total.lag0_6)
forest.res.PM10.total.lag0_6 <- forest_lancet(ma.res.PM10.total.lag0_6, 0.9, 1.1)
```

```{r, lag 0-24 h}
res.PM2.5.total.lag0_24 <- res.PM2.5.total %>%
  filter(lag != "0-12")

for (i in c(1, 5, 9)) {
  ma.lag.res.PM2.5.total.lag0_24 <- meta_analyze_lag(res.PM2.5.total.lag0_24[i:(i+3), ])
  
  res.PM2.5.total.lag0_24[i, c("lag", "ee_original", "ll_original", "ul_original",
                             "se_original", "log.EE", "log.SE", "alog.EE", "alog.SE")] <- 
    c("1-24", rep(NA_real_, 6),
      ma.lag.res.PM2.5.total.lag0_24$TE.fixed,
      ma.lag.res.PM2.5.total.lag0_24$seTE.fixed)
  
  res.PM2.5.total.lag0_24 <- res.PM2.5.total.lag0_24 %>%
    mutate(across(c(alog.EE, alog.SE), as.numeric))
}

res.PM2.5.total.lag0_24[13, c("lag", "ee_original", "ll_original", "ul_original", "se_original",
                          "log.EE", "log.SE", "alog.EE", "alog.SE")] <- 
  c("0-24", rep(NA, 6), meta_analyze_lag(res.PM2.5.total.lag0_24[13:22,])$TE.fixed, meta_analyze_lag(res.PM2.5.total.lag0_24[13:22,])$seTE.fixed)

res.PM2.5.total.lag0_24 <- res.PM2.5.total.lag0_24 %>%
    mutate(across(c(alog.EE, alog.SE), as.numeric))

res.PM2.5.total.lag0_24[23, c("lag", "ee_original", "ll_original", "ul_original", "se_original",
```

```{r, season}
res_season.PM2.5.all <- res_season.all %>%
  filter(exposure == "PM2.5")

for (i in seq(3, 15, by = 4)) {
  ma.lag.res_season.PM2.5.all <- meta_analyze_lag(res_season.PM2.5.all[i:(i+3), ])
  
  res_season.PM2.5.all[i, c("lag", "ee_original", "ll_original", "ul_original",
                             "se_original", "log.EE", "log.SE", "alog.EE", "alog.SE")] <- 
    c("1-24", rep(NA_real_, 6),
      ma.lag.res_season.PM2.5.all$TE.fixed,
      ma.lag.res_season.PM2.5.all$seTE.fixed)
  
  res_season.PM2.5.all <- res_season.PM2.5.all %>%
    mutate(across(c(alog.EE, alog.SE), as.numeric))
}

res_season.PM2.5.lag0_24 <- res_season.PM2.5.all[res_season.PM2.5.all$lag %in% c("0-24", "1-24"), ]

res_cold.PM2.5.lag0_24 <- res_season.PM2.5.lag0_24[res_season.PM2.5.lag0_24$stratification == "cold",]
res_warm.PM2.5.lag0_24 <- res_season.PM2.5.lag0_24[res_season.PM2.5.lag0_24$stratification == "warm",]

ma.res_cold.PM2.5.lag0_24 <- meta_analyze(res_cold.PM2.5.lag0_24, "Respiratory, Total - PM2.5 - Cold (lag 0-24 h)")
summary(ma.res_cold.PM2.5.lag0_24)
forest_lancet(ma.res_cold.PM2.5.lag0_24, 0.9, 1.1)

ma.res_warm.PM2.5.lag0_24 <- meta_analyze(res_warm.PM2.5.lag0_24, "Respiratory, Total - PM2.5 - Warm (lag 0-24 h)")
summary(ma.res_warm.PM2.5.lag0_24)
forest_lancet(ma.res_warm.PM2.5.lag0_24, 0.9, 1.1)
```

### Synthesis

Overall

```{r}

total_res <- data.frame()
df_analysis_res <- data.frame()

for (exp in exposures_res) {
  for (lag_i in lags_res) {

      obj_name <- paste0("res.", exp, ".total.lag0_", lag_i)

      if (!exists(obj_name)) {
        message("Skipping missing object: ", obj_name)
        next
      }

      dat <- get(obj_name)
      
      title_txt <- paste0(
        "Respiratory, Total - ", exp, " - ",
        " (lag 0-", lag_i, " h)"
      )

      obj <- meta_analyze(dat, title_txt)

      tmp <- data.frame(
        exposure = exp,
        lag      = paste0("0-", lag_i),
        k        = obj$k,
        I2       = paste0(round(obj$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
        ee       = round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        lb       = round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        ub       = round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        pval     = format(obj$pval.random, scientific = FALSE)
      )
      
      tbl <- data.frame(title = obj$title,
                        studlab = obj$studlab, 
                        ee = paste0(round((exp(obj$TE) - 1) * 100, 2), "%"), 
                        lb = paste0(round((exp(obj$lower) - 1) * 100, 2), "%"), 
                        ub = paste0(round((exp(obj$upper) - 1) * 100, 2), "%"),
                        weight = paste0(round(obj$w.random/sum(obj$w.random) * 100, 2), "%"))

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 4. Append to master dataset
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      total_res <- rbind(total_res, tmp)
      df_analysis_res <- rbind(df_analysis_res, tbl)
  }
}

total_res <- total_res %>% 
  mutate(exposure_lag = paste0(exposure," (", lag, " h)"),
         I2 = sub(".","·",I2,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = paste0(ee,"% (",lb,"% to ",ub,"%)"),
         risk = gsub(".","·",risk,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = gsub("-","−",risk,fixed=TRUE),
         lag = paste0("   Lag ", sub("-","−",lag,fixed=TRUE), " hours")) %>%
  add_row(.before=13) %>%
  add_row(.before=10) %>%
  add_row(.before=7) %>%
  add_row(.before=4) %>%
  add_row(.before=1)
  
total_res$lag[c(1,5,9,13,17)] <- exposures_res

write.csv(total_res, "Respiratory Estimates (Total).csv")
write.csv(df_analysis_res, "Dataset - Respiratory (Total).csv")

#DL estimator

total_DL_res <- data.frame()

for (exp in exposures_res) {
  for (lag_i in lags_res) {

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 1. Construct the object name: res.<exposure>.total.lag0_<lag>
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      obj_name <- paste0("res.", exp, ".total.lag0_", lag_i)

      # Check object exists
      if (!exists(obj_name)) {
        message("Skipping missing object: ", obj_name)
        next
      }

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 2. Run meta analysis
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      dat <- get(obj_name)
      
      title_txt <- paste0(
        "Cardiovascular, Total - ", exp, " - ",
        " (lag 0-", lag_i, " h)"
      )

      obj <- meta_analyze_DL(dat, title_txt)

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 3. Build summary row
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      tmp <- data.frame(
        exposure = exp,
        lag      = paste0("0-", lag_i),
        k        = obj$k,
        I2       = paste0(round(obj$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
        ee       = paste0(round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "%"),
        lb       = paste0(round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "%"),
        ub       = paste0(round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "%"),
        pval     = format(obj$pval.random, scientific = FALSE),
        significant = ifelse(round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2)>0,"*","")
      )

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 4. Append to master dataset
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      total_DL_res <- rbind(total_DL_res, tmp)
  }
}
```

Subgroup

```{r}

season_res <- data.frame()

for (exp in exposures_res) {
  for (lag_i in 24) {
    for (i in c("cold", "warm")) {

      obj_name <- paste0("res_", i, ".", exp, ".lag0_", lag_i)

      if (!exists(obj_name)) {
        message("Skipping missing object: ", obj_name)
        next
      }

      dat <- get(obj_name)
      dat_sub <- dat[dat$stratification == i, ]

      if (nrow(dat_sub) == 0) {
        message("No rows for ", obj_name, " + ", i)
        next
      }

      title_txt <- paste0(
        "Respiratory, Total - ", exp, " - ", i,
        " Season (lag 0-", lag_i, " h)"
      )

      obj <- meta_analyze(dat_sub, title_txt)

      tmp <- data.frame(
        exposure = exp,
        season   = i,
        lag      = paste0("0-", lag_i),
        k        = obj$k,
        n        = sum(dat_sub$n),
        I2       = paste0(round(obj$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
        ee       = round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        lb       = round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        ub       = round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        pval     = format(obj$pval.random, scientific = FALSE),
        significant = ifelse(round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2)>0,"*",""),
        logRR    = obj$TE.random,
        logSE    = obj$seTE.random
      )

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 5. Append to master dataset
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      season_res <- rbind(season_res, tmp)
    }
  }
}

season_res <- season_res %>%
  arrange(exposure, desc(season))

season_res <- season_res %>%
  group_by(exposure, lag) %>%
  mutate(
    p_diff = 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs((logRR - lead(logRR)) / sqrt(logSE^2 + lead(logSE)^2)))),
    sig_diff = ifelse(p_diff<0.05,"*","")
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-c(logRR, logSE))

season_res <- season_res %>% 
  mutate(exposure_lag_group = paste0(exposure," (", lag, " h) - ", season),
         I2 = sub(".","·",I2,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = paste0(ee,"% (",lb,"% to ",ub,"%)"),
         risk = gsub(".","·",risk,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = gsub("-","−",risk,fixed=TRUE),
         season = paste0("   ",season)) %>%
  add_row(.before=3) %>%
  add_row(.before=3) %>%
  add_row(.before=1) %>%
  add_row(.before=1)
  
season_res$season[c(1,2,5,6)] <- c("PM10", "Lag 0−24 hours", "PM2.5", "Lag 0−24 hours")

summary(meta_analyze(res.PM2.5.total.lag0_24 %>% filter(Outcome=="EAC"), "x"))
total_outcome_res <- data.frame()

for (exp in exposures_res) {
  for (lag_i in lags_res) {
    for (oc in c("EAC", "EHA")) {

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 1. Construct the object name: res.<exposure>.total.lag0_<lag>
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      obj_name <- paste0("res.", exp, ".total.lag0_", lag_i)

      # Check object exists
      if (!exists(obj_name)) {
        message("Skipping missing object: ", obj_name)
        next
      }

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 2. Retrieve dataset and subset by the outcome
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      dat <- get(obj_name)
      dat_sub <- dat[dat$Outcome == oc, ]

      if (nrow(dat_sub) == 0) {
        message("No rows for ", obj_name, " + outcome ", oc)
        next
      }

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 3. Run meta analysis
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      title_txt <- paste0(
        "Respiratory, Total - ", exp, " - ", oc,
        " (lag 0-", lag_i, " h)"
      )

      obj <- meta_analyze(dat_sub, title_txt)

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 4. Build summary row
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      tmp <- data.frame(
        exposure = exp,
        outcome  = oc,
        lag      = paste0("0-", lag_i),
        k        = obj$k,
        n        = sum(dat_sub$n),
        I2       = paste0(round(obj$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
        ee       = round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        lb       = round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        ub       = round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2),
        pval     = format(obj$pval.random, scientific = FALSE),
        significant = ifelse(round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2)>0,"*",""),
        logRR    = obj$TE.random,
        logSE    = obj$seTE.random
      )

      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      # 5. Append to master dataset
      # ---------------------------------------------------------
      total_outcome_res <- rbind(total_outcome_res, tmp)
    }
  }
}

total_outcome_res <- total_outcome_res[total_outcome_res$k>=3,]

total_outcome_res <- total_outcome_res %>%
  arrange(factor(exposure, levels = c("PM10", "PM2.5", "O3")), factor(lag, levels = c("0-6", "0-12", "0-24"))) %>%
  group_by(exposure, lag) %>%
  mutate(
    p_diff = 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs((logRR - lead(logRR)) / sqrt(logSE^2 + lead(logSE)^2)))),
    sig_diff = ifelse(p_diff<0.05,"*","")
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-c(logRR, logSE))

total_outcome_res <- total_outcome_res %>% 
  filter(exposure == "PM2.5" & lag %in% c("0-12", "0-24")) %>%
  mutate(exposure_lag_group = paste0(exposure," (", lag, " h) - ", outcome),
         I2 = sub(".","·",I2,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = paste0(ee,"% (",lb,"% to ",ub,"%)"),
         risk = gsub(".","·",risk,fixed=TRUE),
         risk = gsub("-","−",risk,fixed=TRUE),
         outcome = paste0("   ", outcome)) %>%
  add_row(.before=3) %>%
  add_row(.before=1) %>%
  add_row(.before=1)
  
total_outcome_res$outcome[c(1,2,5)] <- c("PM2.5", "Lag 0−12 hours", "Lag 0−24 hours")
```

### Forest Plots

```{r}

lag_labels_total <- lapply(total_res$lag, function(x) {
  if (is.na(x)) return(NA)
  
  switch(x,
    # ── Pollutant subheaders (subscript) ────────────────────────────────
    "PM2.5"    = expression("PM"["2·5"]),
    "PM10"     = expression("PM"[10]),
    "NO2"      = expression("NO"[2]),
    "SO2"      = expression("SO"[2]),
    "O3"       = expression("O"[3]),
    
    x
  )
})

total_forest_res <-
forestplot(
  labeltext = list(
    lag = lag_labels_total,
    k   = total_res$k,
    I2  = total_res$I2,
    ER  = total_res$risk,
    nil = rep(NA, nrow(total_res))  # ← was NA, must match row count
  ),
  mean  = total_res$ee,
  lower = total_res$lb,
  upper = total_res$ub,
  graph.pos          = 5,
  boxsize            = 0.2,
  ci.vertices        = TRUE,
  ci.vertices.height = 0.1,
  lineheight         = unit(7, "mm"),
  clip               = c(-1, 1),
  arrow              = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
  col = fpColors(
    box  = "black",
    line = "black",
    zero = "black"
  ),
  txt_gp = fpTxtGp(
    label = gpar(fontface = "plain", cex = 0.9),
    ticks = gpar(fontface = "plain", cex = 0.6),
    xlab  = gpar(fontface = "bold",  cex = 0.8),
    title = gpar(fontface = "bold",  cex = 0.9)
  ),
  lty   = 1,
  align = "l"
) |>
  fp_add_header(
    lag = "Exposure",
    k   = "No. of studies",
    nil = "",
    ER  = "Excess Risk (95% CI)",
    I2  = expression(bold(italic(I)^2))
  ) |>
  fp_add_lines(
    h_2  = gpar(col = "black", lty = 1),
    h_22 = gpar(col = "black", lty = 1)
  )

lag_labels_total <- lapply(season_res$season, function(x) {
  if (is.na(x)) return(NA)
  
  switch(x,
    # ── Pollutant subheaders (subscript) ────────────────────────────────
    "PM2.5"    = expression("PM"["2·5"]),
    "PM10"     = expression("PM"[10]),
    "   warm"    = "   Warm",
    "   cold"    = "   Cold",
    
    x
  )
})

) |>

lag_labels_total <- lapply(total_outcome_res$outcome, function(x) {
```

### Sensitivity Analyses
```{r}
sen_main_res <- data.frame()
sen_loo_res  <- data.frame()

  for (exp in exposures_res) {
    for (lag_i in lags_res) {

      # -------------------------------------------------------
      # 1. Retrieve dataset
      # -------------------------------------------------------
      obj_name <- paste0(
        "res.", exp, ".total.lag0_", lag_i
      )

      if (!exists(obj_name, inherits = TRUE)) next

      dat <- get(obj_name, inherits = TRUE)

      if (nrow(dat) < 3) next

      # -------------------------------------------------------
      # 2. Main meta-analysis
      # -------------------------------------------------------
      obj <- meta_analyze(
        dat,
        paste0("Respiratory, Total - ", exp, " (lag 0-", lag_i, " h)")
      )

      # -------------------------------------------------------
      # 3. Leave-one-out meta-analysis
      # -------------------------------------------------------
      loo_ma <- metainf(obj)

      loo_tbl <- data.frame(
        exposure = exp,
        lag      = paste0("0-", lag_i),
        ee       = paste0(round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "% (",
                          round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2), ", ",
                          round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "%)"),
        studlab = loo_ma$studlab,
        ee_loo  = paste0(round((exp(loo_ma$TE) - 1) * 100, 2), "% (",
                          round((exp(loo_ma$lower) - 1) * 100, 2), ", ",
                          round((exp(loo_ma$upper) - 1) * 100, 2), "%)")
      ) %>%
        filter(
          sign(loo_ma$TE) != sign(obj$TE.random) & sign(loo_ma$lower) != sign(obj$lower.random)
        )

      sen_loo_res <- rbind(sen_loo_res, loo_tbl)

      # -------------------------------------------------------
      # 4. High RoB exclusion
      # -------------------------------------------------------
      rob_dat <- dat %>% filter(RoB != "High")

      if (nrow(rob_dat) < 3) next

      rob <- meta_analyze(
        rob_dat,
        paste0(
          "Respiratory, Total - ", exp,
          " (lag 0-", lag_i, " h) - Excluding High RoB"
        )
      )

      # -------------------------------------------------------
      # 5. Main sensitivity summary row
      # -------------------------------------------------------
      tmp <- data.frame(
        exposure   = exp,
        lag        = paste0("0-", lag_i),
        k          = obj$k,
        I2       = paste0(round(obj$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
        ee       = paste0(round((exp(obj$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "% (",
                          round((exp(obj$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2), ", ",
                          round((exp(obj$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "%)"),
        PI       = paste0("(", round((exp(obj$lower.predict) - 1) * 100, 2), ", ",
                            round((exp(obj$upper.predict) - 1) * 100, 2), "%)"),
        k_removed  = rob$k,
        I2_removed = paste0(round(rob$I2 * 100, 2), "%"),
        ee_removed =  paste0(round((exp(rob$TE.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "% (",
                          round((exp(rob$lower.random) - 1) * 100, 2), ", ",
                          round((exp(rob$upper.random) - 1) * 100, 2), "%)"),
  p_diff   = if (!is.null(rob)) 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs((obj$TE.random-rob$TE.random)/(sqrt(obj$seTE.random^2 + rob$seTE.random^2))))) else NA_integer_,
  diff_sig = if (!is.null(rob)) ifelse(2 * (1 - pnorm(abs((obj$TE.random-rob$TE.random)/(sqrt(obj$seTE.random^2 + rob$seTE.random^2))))) < 0.05, "Yes", "No") else NA_integer_,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )

      sen_main_res <- rbind(sen_main_res, tmp)
    }
  }

write.csv(sen_main_res, "Sensitivity Analysis - Respiratory Estimates (Total).csv")

```
